title: Entering the Lab (Covid-19 Shutdown Re-Entry, Srivastava Lab)

steps: Hand sanitizer pump outside the door - use before unlocking door
Sanitize phone/any other object that will be in the workspace with 70% ethanol wipe
Wipe bench, pipettes, pens, etc with 70% ethanol
If it is your “high touch” day, wipe all handles (incubator, freezer, door, etc) with 70% ethanol
Turn off faucet with paper towel
creator: Mansi Srivastava
